questions.question:
We can use the noun time with different parst of speech.
Adjective + time: the first time, the last time, the next time, a short time, a long time, this time, that time
preposition + time: on time, in time, over time, through time
verb + time: spend time, waste time, make time, run out of time
Some people are always late. They find it very hard to be {} time.
The {} time I went skiing, I broke my leg. I’m not going again!
{} time doing things you enjoy will make time pass more quickly.
My brother {} time playing computer games instead of studying, so he failed his exams.
It took scientists a {} time to discover DNA.
Things such as the cost of living and property prices increase {} time.
Happy people {} time to exercise, eat healthily, and do fun things like see friends.
The {} time I go on vacation! I’m going somewhere hot. The weather here is so cold!
